message:
feat: add ReadTranscript and ResumeHistory for transcript-based resume

ReadTranscript reads a JSONL transcript file back into header + entries,
silently skipping partial/corrupt lines for crash recovery. ResumeHistory
finds the last compaction turn (CHECKPOINT or SUMMARY) and returns it plus
all subsequent turns, enabling session resume from transcript.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
